|casual1=*Many Y-wings *1 X-wing disabled *1 Corvette |casual2=*6 Survivor clutches *Over 12 True Invid clutches *1 Corvette |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|We have serious trouble here, ''Invidious''. You have fighters coming up from Xa Fel.''"
"''It will be impossible for them to get through our fighter screen, Rock Lead.''"
"''Don't say impossible. That's Rogue Squadron, and impossible is their stock in trade.|Corran Horn and the ''Invidious''|}} The '''battle of Xa Fel''' was fought at [[Xa Fel/Legends|Xa Fel]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] [[Invids]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==The battle== A [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] task force had been sent to the world [[Xa Fel/Legends|Xa Fel]] on a surprise visit to ensure that the local [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|KDY]] industrial leaders began to get serious about complying with New Republic environmental regulations that had allowed to go slack due to the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn crisis]] and [[Operation Shadow Hand]]. The [[Invids]] pirate organization under [[Leonia Tavira]] had also targeted Xa Fel as their next raiding destination. Arriving in the midst of the New Republic inspection, the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] fighter squadrons under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jenos Idanian]] (really [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]) managed to defend the ''[[Invidious]]'' and stave off large-scale casualties for the pirates, allowing them to flee into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ==Appearances== *''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Invid}} {{Interlang |es=Segunda Batalla de Xa Fel }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Xa Fel, Second Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of the Invid crisis]] [[Category:Battles of Xa Fel]]
